metadata.name: Changeling CDA — Universal Automaton is every creature type
metadata.description: p1 casts Universal Automaton ({1}, 1/1 Artifact Creature — Shapeshifter with Changeling). After it enters the battlefield, the Changeling CDA (CR 702.73a) causes the creature to be every creature type simultaneously via a Layer 4 characteristic-defining ability (CR 613.1d, 613.3). The script asserts the creature is present on the battlefield. The all-types property (Elf, Goblin, Human, Dragon, Shapeshifter, and ~290+ others) is verified by the unit tests in crates/engine/tests/changeling.rs; the harness assertion schema does not yet support direct subtype path queries. This script validates the full cast-enter-battlefield flow for the Changeling keyword.
metadata.generation_notes:
CR 702.73a: Changeling is a characteristic-defining ability. 'This object is every creature type.' CDAs function in all zones (CR 604.3) and are applied first within Layer 4 before non-CDA type-changing effects (CR 613.3).

Universal Automaton oracle text: '{1} — Artifact Creature — Shapeshifter 1/1 — Changeling (This card is every creature type.)'

The Changeling CDA is implemented inline in calculate_characteristics() at the start of Layer 4 processing (rules/layers.rs). When chars.keywords contains KeywordAbility::Changeling, ALL_CREATURE_TYPES (~290+ SubType values from CR 205.3m) are added to chars.subtypes before any Layer 4 continuous effects are applied. This ensures CDA-first ordering per CR 613.3.

Key CR facts:
- Layer 4 (CR 613.1d): Type-changing effects applied here.
- CDA ordering (CR 613.3): Within layer 4, CDAs apply before non-CDAs in timestamp order.
- 'Lose all abilities' in Layer 6 removes KeywordAbility::Changeling from keywords, but the subtypes set in Layer 4 is not undone (Maskwood Nexus ruling 2021-02-05: 'If a creature with changeling loses all abilities, it remains all creature types').

Subtype assertions (Elf, Goblin, Human, Dragon, Shapeshifter simultaneously) are covered by the unit tests in crates/engine/tests/changeling.rs:
  - test_changeling_has_all_creature_types: asserts subtypes.len() >= 290 and contains representative types
  - test_changeling_lose_all_abilities_keeps_types: validates Layer 4/6 ordering
  - test_changeling_overridden_by_set_type_line: validates CDA + SetTypeLine interaction
  - test_changeling_protection_from_subtype_matches: validates protection matching
  - test_changeling_works_in_graveyard: validates all-zones CDA (CR 604.3)

The replay harness assertion schema (script_replay.rs check_assertions) does not have a 'permanent.<name>.subtypes' path, so subtype assertions cannot be made in game scripts. The script validates the observable harness state: the creature enters the battlefield and is present there after resolution.

Initial state: p1 has 1 colorless mana in pool (from a Sol Ring that already activated, not on battlefield). Universal Automaton costs {1} — 1 colorless generic mana.

Disputes: (1) Universal Automaton card definition not yet added to the engine (step 5 of ability-wip.md). The harness will silently skip or fail to place the creature until the CardDefinition is registered in definitions.rs. (2) Subtype assertions are documentation-only — not enforced by the harness.

disputes.description: Missing card definition: Universal Automaton is not yet registered in crates/engine/src/cards/definitions.rs. The CardRegistry will not find the card, causing the cast_spell command to fail with an unknown-card error. This script is a documentation artifact for the Changeling ability pipeline (step 6 of ability-wip.md). It will pass once step 5 (card definition) is completed and Universal Automaton's CardDefinition (1/1 Artifact Creature — Shapeshifter with KeywordAbility::Changeling, ManaCost: Generic(1)) is added to definitions.rs.

Subtype assertions (permanent.Universal Automaton.subtypes includes [Elf, Goblin, Human, Dragon, Shapeshifter]) cannot be expressed in the harness assertion schema. The script_replay.rs check_assertions function does not have a 'permanent.<name>.subtypes' path. The Changeling all-types behavior is validated by unit tests in crates/engine/tests/changeling.rs (7 tests covering CDA, layer ordering, all-zones behavior, and protection matching). If a 'permanent.<name>.subtypes.includes' assertion path is added to check_assertions in the future, this script should be updated to include explicit subtype assertions.

script.step_note: p1 casts Universal Automaton for {1}. It enters the battlefield with Changeling, making it every creature type via a Layer 4 CDA (CR 702.73a, 613.3).

actions.description: Initial: Universal Automaton in p1 hand; p1 battlefield empty; stack empty
actions.note: Universal Automaton is in p1's hand. p1 has {1} colorless mana available to pay its cost.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Universal Automaton. Total cost is {1} (generic). p1 pays with 1 colorless mana from the pool. No targets — Universal Automaton has no targets. Spell placed on stack.

actions.description: After casting: Universal Automaton on stack; hand empty
actions.note: Universal Automaton moved from hand to stack. p1's mana pool is empty after paying {1}.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — the top of the stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Universal Automaton resolves and enters the battlefield under p1's control. CR 702.73a: The Changeling CDA activates in Layer 4 — Universal Automaton gains all creature subtypes (Elf, Goblin, Human, Dragon, Shapeshifter, and ~290 others from CR 205.3m). CR 613.3: The Changeling CDA applies before any non-CDA Layer 4 effects. The creature is simultaneously every creature type.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Creature spell resolves; creature enters the battlefield. The Changeling CDA (CR 702.73a) is applied at Layer 4 (CR 613.1d) during calculate_characteristics, adding ALL_CREATURE_TYPES to the creature's subtypes before any Layer 4 continuous effects.

actions.description: Final: Universal Automaton on p1 battlefield; hand empty; stack empty
actions.note: Universal Automaton is on the battlefield. Via Changeling (CR 702.73a), it is simultaneously an Elf, a Goblin, a Human, a Dragon, a Shapeshifter, and every other creature type. This is a CDA applied in Layer 4 (CR 613.1d) before non-CDA effects (CR 613.3). Subtype assertions are validated by unit tests in changeling.rs rather than by the harness assertion schema.
